module.name: Token Formations
module.description: A module for managing token formations in Foundry VTT

queueWidth.name: Formation Width
queueWidth.hint: Set the width (in grid cells) of the follower formation.

maxDistance.name: Maximum Distance
maxDistance.hint: Set the maximum distance a token can follow the leader. 0 = Infinite. Set a limit if the system is slow.

showFollowingIndicator.name: Show following indicator
showFollowingIndicator.hint: Enable or disable the following indicator.

indicatorSize.name: Indicator size
indicatorSize.hint: Choose the size of the following indicator.

indicatorCorner.name: Indicator corner
indicatorCorner.hint: Choose the corner where the indicator is displayed on the token.

showIndicatorBorder.name: Show indicator border
showIndicatorBorder.hint: Enable or disable the border of the following indicator.

indicatorColor.name: Indicator border color
indicatorColor.hint: Choose the color of the following indicator's border.

indicatorBorderThickness.name: Indicator border thickness
indicatorBorderThickness.hint: Choose the thickness of the following indicator's border.

messages.hoverLeader: Please hover over a leader token!
messages.targetTooFar: The target to reach is too far
messages.confirmClearAll: Are you sure you want to remove all formations?
messages.confirmDisbandFormation: Are you sure you want to disband the selected formation?

tooltips.info: This module allows you to create and manage token formations. Select a token, hover another, and press F to make it follow. Use the buttons below to disband formations.
